name: speaking-character
description: Cartoon pirate parrot that speaks German via ElevenLabs for a kids' birthday Schatzsuche, rendered with react-three-fiber and driven by an LG webOS TV remote.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
